basics.name: Enoch Agyemang Twumasi
basics.label:
Software Engineer,
Systems Architect, and Technical Operator
basics.summary:
Software engineer and systems architect who builds modern enterprise
applications with a deep understanding of underlying runtime, network, and
infrastructure layers. Bridges the gap between low-level computing
invariants—such as JavaScript execution models, network transport mechanics, and
system resource management—and modern, high-level product delivery (Next.js 16+,
React 19, TypeScript). Highly adaptable and academically rigorous, combining an
extensive background in physical operational systems with a proven track record
of engineering deterministic architecture, strict security boundaries, and
highly reliable digital infrastructure.

work.name:
First and
Last
work.summary:
Independent
engineering consultancy specializing in high-performance web architecture,
custom functional ecosystems, interactive logic tools, and business
automation.
highlights:
Architected flagship production platforms
utilizing Next.js 16+ and React 19 Server Components, securing near-instant Time
to First Byte (TTFB) and perfect 100 Core Web Vitals.

Engineered programmatic
structured data pipelines and a centralized seo.ts infrastructure mapping
semantic entity relationships to guarantee deterministic search visibility.

Developed 'FALM OS,' a relational management infrastructure backed by custom
database schemas and multi-tenant isolation logic to maintain absolute data
integrity.

Designed immutable enterprise email architecture isolating
reputation boundaries across Human, System, Automation, and Authority layers.

Engineered secure role-based applications utilizing complex state modeling and
React Actions to enforce server-side permission boundaries.

Built centralized
security vaults utilizing server-level logic to manage API keys and credentials
across microservices securely.

Designed deterministic Retrieval-Augmented
Generation (RAG) systems utilizing Next.js Route Handlers to integrate LLMs with
strict execution boundaries.

Developed highly scalable MDX-based
infrastructure to programmatically parse and render technical documentation.

Developed client-side algorithms and pricing calculators to automatically
qualify inbound traffic and mathematically model pricing.

work.name: Indian Summer Pool
work.summary:
Domain consultant and technician for
commercial and residential pool systems.
highlights:
Executed complex
physical installations, maintenance, and plumbing repairs on commercial and
residential filtration systems.

Ensured precise chemical balancing and strict
safety compliance in operational environments.

Leveraged hands-on,
domain-specific field knowledge to accurately scope, design, and architect the
company's digital infrastructure and local search ecosystem.

work.name: Missouri University of Science and Technology
work.summary:

the Kummer Center for STEM Education.
highlights:
Delivered technical
instruction and engaging STEM experiences to K-12 students, translating complex
scientific and engineering concepts into accessible learning models.

Managed
technical inventory and organized operational logistics for Project Lead The Way
(PLTW) events in collaboration with university faculty.

work.name: Tekniplex & Healthcare Services
work.position: Industrial Machine Operator & Clinical Care Aide
work.summary: Dual operational role spanning industrial manufacturing and dedicated clinical healthcare.
highlights: Operated, maintained, and troubleshooted advanced mechanical and digital manufacturing equipment, upholding rigid safety and quality standards.
Conducted routine hardware inspections to minimize manufacturing downtime.
Provided dedicated healthcare support to high-needs patients (including Dementia care), maintaining strict medical protocols in sensitive environments.

work.name: Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology
work.position: Radiology Assistant & Rural Health Team Member
work.summary: Clinical and rural healthcare operational support.
highlights: Managed patient intake, reporting, and billing for clinical CT procedures within the university Radiology Department.
Deployed with the GNAAS Health Team to provide secondary healthcare services, emergency first aid, and OTC administration to underserved rural communities.

work.name: National Seminars
work.summary: Technical operator for nationwide live broadcasting.
highlights: Executed live, nationwide streaming for large-scale seminar events, ensuring zero-downtime broadcasting and high-fidelity video/audio routing.

work.name: Missouri S&T University Police Dept.
work.summary: Security liaison and campus safety operator.
highlights: Patrolled campus infrastructure, monitored secure access points, and enforced safety protocols with a high degree of situational awareness.

work.name: Healthy Planet / Wellness Wagon
work.summary: Operational lead for stock and delivery tracking.
highlights: Managed accurate inventory tracking, dynamic stock replenishment, and order staging for B2B and B2C logistics.

projects.name: OneByte Protocol
projects.description:
Independent
systems and network engineering initiative demonstrating custom
application-layer binary protocol design over connectionless sockets.
highlights:
Designed and hand-coded a compact application-layer protocol
implementing explicit bit-level serialization to pack multi-field state data
into a single 8-bit payload.

Engineered a connectionless client/server
network architecture using Node.js dgram (UDP sockets) and raw Buffer
allocation, stepping beneath standard HTTP abstractions.

Programmed
compression and decoding pipelines using logical bitwise masking and shifting
operations (&, |, <<, >>), achieving a 98% reduction in transmission bandwidth
relative to JSON.

Analyzed constraint-driven telemetry and state reporting
architectures critical for resource-constrained systems like IoT, LPWANs, and
embedded industrial controllers.
